title: PACT v0 frame/Claim record
description: Re-authored from kernel transaction-record.schema.json (TRANSFER-PROVENANCE.md). required[] is the ONLY part the lenient runtime validator (record.js validateRecord) enforces; additionalProperties + patterns are the strict/documentary schema. A v0 record is a PACT frame (spec §2) carrying a Claim payload (spec §3).

type.description: frame type; v0 ships CLAIM only

idempotency_key.description: optional INV-22 key, re-derivable from the body (record.js deriveIdempotencyKey)

sig.description: optional ed25519 signature over record_id (base64); verified by the frame layer (spec §2)
